S.FORM: == kakaliman == Yi-ta-li ta-paw-ciw Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ś§ßŚ†°Á§Ā Ta-paw-ciw " igu : Great Barrier Reef" u satabakiay satanayuay nu kitakid a San-hu-ciw subal, itida i tip tay-pin-yen a Aw-cuo wali amis dadipasan nu bayu, tanayu namaka Aw-cuo wali amis Kun-se-lan-cuo hekalay a San-hu bayuan, amis namaka Tuo-lei-se bayuan, nutipan katukuh Nan-huy-kuy-sin nu timulan "timul nu laa'tan 10Ôĺütimul nu laa'tan 24Ôĺü",satanayu sa ku ahebal makaala tu tulimsepsep kun-li, ahebal caylimcay kuli. .
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == ji-ta-r~…ĺi ta-paw- ¶iw ****** ta-paw- ¶iw " igu : gr…ôat barri…ôr *…ô…ôf" u satabakiaj satanajuaj nu kitakid a san-ńßu- ¶iw subar~…ĺ, itida i tip taj-pin-j…ôn a aw- ¶uo war~…ĺi amis dadipasan nu baju, tanaju namaka aw- ¶uo war~…ĺi amis kun-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶uo ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a san-ńßu bajuan, amis namaka tuo-r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô bajuan, nutipan katukuńß nan-ńßuj-kuj-sin nu timur~…ĺan "timur~…ĺ nu r~…ĺaa Ē~ °tan ***timur~…ĺ nu r~…ĺaa Ē~ °tan ***",satanaju sa ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺ makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺims…ôps…ôp kun-r~…ĺi, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ¶ajr~…ĺim ¶aj kur~…ĺi. .
S.FORM: == kakaliman == Yi-ta-li ta-paw-ciw Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ś§ßŚ†°Á§Ā Ta-paw-ciw " igu : Great Barrier Reef" u satabakiay satanayuay nu kitakid a San-hu-ciw subal, itida i tip tay-pin-yen a Aw-cuo wali amis dadipasan nu bayu, tanayu namaka Aw-cuo wali amis Kun-se-lan-cuo hekalay a San-hu bayuan, amis namaka Tuo-lei-se bayuan, nutipan katukuh Nan-huy-kuy-sin nu timulan "timul nu laa'tan 10Ôĺütimul nu laa'tan 24Ôĺü",satanayu sa ku ahebal makaala tu tulimsepsep kun-li, ahebal caylimcay kuli. .
